scores.correctness_notes: Agent provides Python API details which the gold standard explicitly says are not in charmlibs docs (only in traefik-k8s-operator repo). Gold standard focuses on the data schema (application-data: name, model, port; unit-data: host) which the agent omits entirely. Agent uses v2 while gold standard recommends v1.
scores.hallucination_notes: IngressPerAppRequirer is confirmed real by the gold standard's own note. However, strip_prefix parameter, event names (IngressPerAppReadyEvent, IngressPerAppRevokedEvent), and .url property cannot be verified against gold standard. These are plausible but unverifiable from the source — minor risk of inaccuracy.
